title: The Seven Essential Factors for Ethical AI Policy
description: A flowchart illustrating the seven interconnected factors that must be considered when formulating ethical public policy for Artificial Intelligence. The diagram shows how these factors are not standalone but influence and depend on each other to create a holistic framework.
relationships: Each factor is a node connected bidirectionally to all others, demonstrating their interdependence. For example, 'Transparency' is necessary for 'Accountability', and 'Robustness & Safety' is a prerequisite for 'Human Control'. The central placement of 'Societal & Environmental Well-being' indicates it is the ultimate goal influenced by all other factors.
